title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva attempts to persuade Karthikeya to join the mission to defeat Tarakasura. However, Karthikeya decides to stay with his mother and declines Lord Shiva's invitation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Brahma expresses concern when Karthikeya refuses to defeat Tarakasura. However, Lord Shiva devises a clever strategy to persuade Karthikeya to reconsider his decision.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Kartikeya suggests Parvati and Shankar to give an invitation card to all the Gods for Ganpati's Vrat Bandhan ceremony. Parvati, Shankar and all the other Gods like the new idea of invitation cards.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Rejected by Mahadeva and Vishnu, Lord Brahma seeks aid from Chandradev. However, Chandradev's denial provokes Brahma's curse.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Narad is cursed by his father Brahmadev for not favouring his orders. Unable to tolerate Brahmadev's nature, Chandradev goes in search of Ganesha. Can Batukh calm Brahmadev down?

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Indradev is offended when he finds Nalakubher sleeping during his lectures in the Gurukul. Meanwhile, Batuk Maharaj is bored of sitting idle and asks Parvati and Nandi to play with him.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As Chanchala returns from London, Rashmi asks her to convince Janaki not to divorce Niranjan. On the other hand, Chandu meets the Chief Minister to discuss his ministership in the cabinet. Will Chandu receive good news from the Chief Minister?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Niranjan informs Janaki that he was blackmailed by a person to marry her to clear off his debt. He vows to reveal his name at the family dinner. Having learnt about Niranjan's plan from Janaki, what does Chandu plan to do to save himself?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: While Chandu has made arrangements to trap Niranjan before he speaks out the truth, things turn out to be different. Will Niranjan get away from Chandu's plan? Will he reveal the truth to the family?

title: Pattanakke Banda Putta
subTitle: Putta, an orphan, encounters his biological father after ages and comes to the city with him. But he ends up meeting his stepbrothers, who had attempted to misbehave with his girlfriend.

title: March 22
subTitle: The villagers from Rayadurga live a peaceful life, like a close-knit family. However, a prolonged famine and the arrival of a geologist lead to disharmony and chaos in their lives.

title: Madamakki
subTitle: Sadhu, a veteran of Mumbai's underworld, decides to go into hiding after his boss is gunned down. However, before he leaves, he makes one last trip to go see his mother in Madamakki.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As the hearing continues in the court, CSP argues that Varun Vaibhav should undergo a DNA test to ascertain that he is Inchara's father. However, Sheela Bhushan makes a compelling argument against it.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki is shocked when Madhukar informs her about Varun Vaibhav's fat cheque and the ill intention behind it. However, he also reveals that Sheela Bhushan suggested that he use that money to help the people in need.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya resolves not to part ways with his mother at any cost. Meanwhile, Karthikeya's mother implores him to embrace Lord Shiva and Parvati as his true parents and encourages him to visit Kailasa.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Devi Swaroopa becomes emotional as she entrusts Karthikeya to Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati. However, Karthikeya is determined to depart from Kailash and implores Swaroopa to take him along. What will she do in this situation?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: After Niranjan narrates his version of the story, the family is in a dilemma on whom to believe. Chandu tries his best to convince that he is innocent but will his family trust him? Will Niranjan be proved wrong? Stay tuned.

subTitle: After the fight with Chandu, Niranjan decides to leave the house. Before leaving the house, he warns Janaki not to trust Chandu. Niranjan tries his best to convince Janaki that he is innocent. Will Janaki believe Niranjan?

subTitle: When Janaki makes her way to return the cheque, Adithi offers her a job in Jenuthore instead. With her now having accepted the job offer, Janaki requests Chanchala to inform Rashmi about her decision to relocate. Will Rashmi let her go?

subTitle: Balu and Bhavya become embroiled in a heated dispute. As a result, the family members attempt to mediate, hoping to restore harmony between the couple.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Punda unexpectedly comes across a magical flute, which angers Charu. Consequently, Punda devises a plan to reconcile with her.

subTitle: Punda's heartfelt confession of love, focusing on Chaaru's appearance, leaves her feeling conflicted. Later, Chaaru feigns an allergic reaction to alter his perspective.

title: Jaganmathe
subTitle: Sakthi is blessed with powers from the Goddess JAGANMATHE. Adored by the villagers for her abilities, she has grown up under the strict watch of her sister, who is her total opposite. Her life takes a turn when she meets an atheist doctor.

subTitle: Varun Vaibhav lodges a defamation case against Sanjana during the court hearing. Janaki breaks this news to Sanjana and explains that she will have to prove the legitimacy of her claim. How does Sanjana plan on confronting these charges?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Sanjana gets a call from an anonymous person who threatens her and starts asking questions about Devaki's whereabouts. She frantically looks around the house and is gripped with fear when Devaki is nowhere to be seen.

subTitle: Devi Swaroopa makes the tough choice of rejecting Karthikeya's plea to return, leaving him no option but to remain in Kailash. Will Karthikeya embrace his new abode?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Rishi Angiras promises to take care of Devi Swaroopa, and all the six Krittikas bid farewell.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Considering Pandu as her husband, Bale Bangara orders Pandu to sell vegetables in the market. Further, as Srimathi brings the vegetable seller who is Pandu's lookalike to the house, both the ladies fight for their husband.

subTitle: Janaki on her way to Jenuthore meets Shankar Devaghatta and asks him for a job. However, when he offers to hire her as a teacher in his school, she requests him to hide her identity. Why does she want to hide her identity?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As Janaki settles down in Shankar Devaghatta's out house, she gets emotional remembering her family. During the conversation, Shankar Devaghatta questions Janaki about her husband. Will Janaki tell him about Niranjan's betrayal?
